author: kennkyou
description: Import highlights and annotations from your Kobo e-reader into your notes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: KennKyou
manifest.description: Import highlights and annotations from your Kobo e-reader into your notes.
manifest.name: Kobo Note Sync

name: Kobo Note Sync

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes

- Added a sync source selector for Kobo Desktop App vs. a custom Kobo SQLite file.
- Added support for syncing from a user-selected Kobo SQLite database, such as a copied .kobo/KoboReader.sqlite file.
- Added Kobo reader database detection for macOS and Windows.
- Updated English and Traditional Chinese documentation for the new sync modes.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Bundled sql.js WASM into main.js so installs no longer require sql-wasm.wasm.
- Removed localStorage-based locale detection.
- Added third-party license notices for sql.js.

This plugin reads the local Kobo SQLite database path configured by the user and creates or updates notes in the Obsidian vault. It does not send reading data to external servers.

releases.author: KennKyou
releases.description:
Initial release of Kobo Note Sync.

- Import Kobo highlights and annotations from your Kobo e-reader
- Customizable Eta.js templates
- Cross-platform: macOS and Windows
- Append-only sync (preserves existing highlights)
- i18n: English and Traditional Chinese
